summary: Comprehensive testing of Email Verification feature. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: disposable email blocking, signup verification flow, unverified user login redirect, code verification (correct/wrong/expired), resend verification with rate limiting, verified user login.
passed_tests: Backend: Disposable email (guerrillamail.com) blocked at signup with clear error message
Backend: Disposable email (mailinator.com) blocked at signup
Backend: Disposable email (temp-mail.org) blocked at signup
Backend: Disposable email (10minutemail.com) blocked at signup
Backend: New signup returns { needsVerification: true, email } instead of JWT token
Backend: User created with email_verified=false and verification_code set
Backend: Unverified user login returns { needsVerification: true, email }
Backend: Verification with correct 6-digit code returns JWT token and marks user as email_verified
Backend: Verification with wrong code returns 400 error
Backend: Verification without email returns 400 error
Backend: Verification without code returns 400 error
Backend: Verification with expired code returns appropriate error
Backend: Resend verification generates new code and returns success
Backend: Resend verification has rate limiting (1 minute cooldown) - returns 429
Backend: Resend verification for non-existent user returns 404
Backend: Already verified user can login normally and get JWT token
Backend: Already verified user verification returns token without error
Frontend: Register tab shows form with all required fields (name, email, password, confirm password, currency)
Frontend: Disposable email error shown clearly on signup attempt
Frontend: After signup, verification screen appears with 6-digit code inputs
Frontend: Email displayed correctly on verification screen
Frontend: All 6 code input fields present with data-testid attributes
Frontend: First code input auto-focuses on page load
Frontend: Focus auto-advances to next input on digit entry
Frontend: Verify Email button present and functional
Frontend: Resend verification code button visible and working
Frontend: Rate limiting message shown when resend clicked too soon
Frontend: Back to sign in button works and returns to auth page
Frontend: Unverified user login redirects to verification screen
Frontend: Correct email displayed after unverified login redirect
critical_code_review_comments: Email verification implementation is complete and working correctly
Disposable email blocking uses 'disposable-email-domains' package blocklist
Rate limiting on resend verification (1 minute cooldown) working correctly
Magic link verification via URL param (?verify=token) implemented in page.js
Both FastAPI backend and Next.js API routes handle verification - K8s ingress routes /api to FastAPI
Security: password_hash never exposed in API responses
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_email_verification.py - New comprehensive test file for email verification feature
seed_data_creation: Created test_verified_user@testdomain.com with email_verified=true for testing verified user login flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification feature fully tested and working. Key flows: 1) Signup with disposable email blocked, 2) Signup with valid email returns needsVerification=true, 3) Unverified user login redirects to verification screen, 4) Correct 6-digit code verification returns JWT token, 5) Wrong/expired code returns appropriate errors, 6) Resend verification has 1-minute rate limit, 7) Verified users can login normally. Test user test_verified_user@testdomain.com exists with password TestVerified123! for future testing.

features_verified.details: Returns needsVerification=true, creates user with email_verified=false
Returns needsVerification=true, frontend shows verification screen
Correct code returns JWT, wrong code returns error, expired code returns error
Generates new code, has 1-minute rate limit (429 response)
Returns JWT token directly without verification
6-digit inputs with auto-focus, auto-advance, resend button, back button
